query:
CREATE TABLE `supplier_sync_log` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`integration` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
	`summary` text,
	`servicesFound` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`servicesCreated` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`servicesUpdated` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`recordsProcessed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`errorMessage` text,
	`durationMs` int,
	`triggeredBy` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled',
	`startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `supplier_sync_log_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
